title: OHP ASSISTER - 211info
text: RAINIER HIGH SCHOOL SBHC OHP ASSISTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers in-person assistance applying and renewing for the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). 28168 Old Rainier Road Rainier, OR 97048 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (800) 244-4870 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 244-4870 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Columbia County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4:30pm Services: Navigator Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
